title: Engineering through production systems.
description: Timeline, roles, and the platforms that shaped how I build.

milestones.title: Joined Bridging Technologies
milestones.detail: Started as Full Stack Developer on Practina, an AI-powered social, ads, and reputation platform.

milestones.title: AI content pipeline in production
milestones.detail: Shipped OpenAI-powered post generation, review responses, and campaign copy — lifting engagement 40%.

milestones.title: Star Player of the Department
milestones.detail: Awarded for technical excellence, platform reliability improvements, and cross-functional collaboration.

milestones.title: AI automation and real-time systems at scale
milestones.detail: Automated Meta/Google Ads and social publishing, shipped Socket.IO tracking, and cut MTTR 50% with Grafana and New Relic.

milestones.title: Promoted to Senior Full Stack Developer
milestones.detail: Moved to Credee, a Stripe Connect-powered B2B payment financing platform.

milestones.title: Payment financing engine at scale
milestones.detail: Shipped Stripe Connect OBO flows, Terminal S700, and async pipelines handling hundreds of thousands of jobs a day at 99.9% reliability.

milestones.title: Star Performer Award
milestones.detail: Recognized by leadership for technical ownership and driving cross-functional engineering initiatives.

milestones.title: Senior Full Stack Developer
milestones.detail: 4.5+ years shipping FinTech, AI, and production infrastructure — leading a team of 10 engineers end to end.

milestones.title: Open to the next challenge
milestones.detail: Looking for senior roles where production architecture, payments, and AI systems actually matter.
